picture_ocr_token_recall.matching_rule: OCR_PHRASE_MATCH_V1 (Stage 6A.1): the normalized expected phrase must appear with word-boundary-safe containment (regex (?<!\w)<phrase>(?!\w) over TEXT_NORMALIZED_V1 text) either inside a SINGLE observed OCR line, or inside the space-joined concatenation of two or more ADJACENT observed OCR fragments for the same picture, ordered by ocr_sequence. A short observed fragment (e.g. 'P-205') is never credited as full recovery of a longer expected phrase (e.g. 'Activate Procedure P-205') -- containment is always checked expected-in-observed, never the reverse.

picture_ocr_token_recall.matching_rule: OCR_PHRASE_MATCH_V1 (Stage 6A.1): the normalized expected phrase must appear with word-boundary-safe containment (regex (?<!\w)<phrase>(?!\w) over TEXT_NORMALIZED_V1 text) either inside a SINGLE observed OCR line, or inside the space-joined concatenation of two or more ADJACENT observed OCR fragments for the same picture, ordered by ocr_sequence. picture_ocr_token_recall.matching_rule: OCR_PHRASE_MATCH_V1 (Stage 6A.1): the normalized expected phrase must appear with word-boundary-safe containment (regex (?<!\w)<phrase>(?!\w) over TEXT_NORMALIZED_V1 text) either inside a SINGLE observed OCR line, or inside the space-joined concatenation of two or more ADJACENT observed OCR fragments for the same picture, ordered by ocr_sequence. A short observed fragment (e.g. 'P-205') is never credited as full recovery of a longer expected phrase (e.g. 'Activate Procedure P-205') -- containment is always checked expected-in-observed, never the reverse.
